headline: Organ Donation Rate Remains at 0.9 Per Million Below Global Average
context: Malaysia's organ donation rate of 0.9 per million population is among the lowest globally despite awareness campaigns.

cards.big: Organ donation rate of 0.9 per million leaves 8,200 patients on transplant waiting lists
cards.sub: Average wait time for kidney transplant exceeds 7 years in Malaysia

cards.big: Only 680,000 Malaysians have registered as organ donors out of 33 million population
cards.sub: Cultural taboos and religious misconceptions remain primary barriers to registration

cards.big: NTRC confirmed 42% of potential donations blocked by family refusal despite donor registration
cards.sub: Family override of registered donor wishes negates individual consent

cards.big: Spain's opt-out organ donation system achieves 46 donors per million population
cards.sub: Presumed consent with family consultation produces dramatically higher donation rates

cards.big: Opt-in organ donation means thousands die waiting while viable organs are buried
Should Malaysia adopt an opt-out organ donation system with family consultation safeguards
